name: 美团红包助手
examples_zh: 帮我领取今天可用的美团外卖红包，并确认是否已经到账
查一下我最近领取过的美团酒店和门票优惠券，列出有效期和使用状态
我晚上想点药品闪购，帮我看看有没有可领的美团医药优惠券
examples_en: Claim today's available Meituan food-delivery coupons and confirm whether they arrived in my account
Check my recently claimed Meituan hotel and attraction-ticket coupons with expiry dates and usage status
I need medicine delivery tonight; see whether any Meituan pharmacy coupons are available to claim
